name: Intariss
description:
Intariss is a tiny griffin with the body of a Pallas's cat (Also known as the manul) and stubby owl-like wings. He is affectionate and wholesome, while also being clumsy. I use him as a persona sometimes, when I find an angsty character I think could use some unconditional affection. This is my first attempt at a non-humanoid bot.

I've done my best to keep them from speaking, but it doesn't always work. I'm open to thoughts about how to improve things.

Art by pixxus.

https://www.deviantart.com/pixxus/art/Pallas-Cat-Griffon-834679463

Update: Switched to limited due to policy updates.
creator: Tydorius
